title: PCS switching center
content: PCS switching center: In personal communications service, a facility that (a) supports access -independent call control /service control, and connection control (switching) functions, and (b) is responsible for interconnection of access and network systems to support end-to-end services. "Note 1:" The PCS switching center represents a collection of one or more network element s. "Note 2:" The term "center" does not imply a physical location.
